arts.ttl: Tuesday's Championship predictions including Watford vs. Leeds
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Watford vs. Leeds.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI vs Watford as Ampadu moved amid nine changes
arts.sum: Pascal Struijk completed a full 90 minutes against Millwall - the first time he has done so since returning from a hamstring injury - and came through fine. Predicted Leeds United XI (4-2-3-1): Meslier; Bogle, Struijk, Rodon, Firpo; Ampadu, Tanaka; James, Aaronson, Solomon; Piroe.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke says Leeds United star is “probably” best in the EFL in his position
arts.sum: Leeds United probably have the best right-back in the Championship right now in summer signing Jayden Bogle, according to Daniel Farke. One of the changes Farke made against Millwall was to hand Isaac Schmidt a rare start at right-back in place of the superb Jayden Bogle.

arts.ttl: Rodon starts: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Watford
arts.sum: The latest Leeds United team news as Daniel Farke side gear up to face Watford in the Championship. The post Rodon starts: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Watford appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI v Watford
arts.sum: Leeds team news: Wöber surgery confirmed, James and Rodon fit Leeds United travel down to Watford on Tuesday night looking to extend their gap at the top of the league after FA Cup defeat on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Darko Gyabi stars as Leeds United loanees make important FA Cup impact
arts.sum: " It was when Gyabi hooked the ball towards goal that Liverpool's Harvey Elliott's was penalised for handball and Argyle were awarded the penalty which Ryan Hardie converted to win them the cup tie." Leeds United loanee Darko Gyabi was among the standout performers for Plymouth Argyle this weekend as the Pilgrims pulled off an FA Cup upset.

arts.ttl: Ideal Leeds United boost as notable Watford players from reverse fixture remain out injured
arts.sum: Leeds United travel down to Vicarage Road this week looking to get back to winning ways as their focus shifts solely to the Championship promotion race. Only five sides have scored at Elland Road in the league this season, one of those were tomorrow night’s opponents Watford.

arts.ttl: Significant Leeds United contract update emerges as trio’s deals wind down
arts.sum: Leeds United are yet to hold talks with out-of-contract trio Junior Firpo, Sam Byram or Josuha Guilavogui, as… The post Significant Leeds United contract update emerges as trio’s deals wind down appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United £144m Championship reality after January transfer decision
arts.sum: Sunderland have the next most valuable squad, but it comes in at more than £40 million less than Leeds’, despite the winter additions. Those transfer additions would have added to the combined value of the two team’s squads.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke sends warning to broadcasters over Leeds United schedule after Portsmouth date moved
arts.sum: When I have a look this week - it’s difficult to understand why we have to play a Wednesday evening late away game then why it’s necessary to have the quickest possible turnaround to play Saturday lunchtime, when players [only get] home in the early Thursday morning. Daniel Farke has warned broadcasters that they risk losing the essence of football if they make it difficult for supporters to get to matches, having seen Leeds United's trip to Portsmouth next month rearranged.
